member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Clients.PhemexRestClient.#ctor(System.Action{Phemex.Net.Objects.Options.PhemexRestOptions})
member.summary: Create a new instance of the PhemexRestClient using provided options

member.summary: Create a new instance of the PhemexRestClient using provided options

member.summary: Set the default options to be used when creating new clients

member.name: T:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPhemexRestClient
member.summary: Client for accessing the Phemex Rest API.

member.name: T:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPhemexSocketClient
member.summary: Client for accessing the Phemex websocket API

member.name: T:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPhemexUserClientProvider
member.summary: Provider for clients with credentials for specific users

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPhemexUserClientProvider.InitializeUserClient(System.String,Phemex.Net.PhemexCredentials,Phemex.Net.PhemexEnvironment)
member.summary: Initialize a client for the specified user identifier. This can be used so to initialize a client for a user so credentials do not need to be passed later.

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPhemexUserClientProvider.ClearUserClients(System.String)
member.summary: Reset the cached clients for a user. This can be useful when a user changes API credentials.

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPhemexUserClientProvider.GetRestClient(System.String,Phemex.Net.PhemexCredentials,Phemex.Net.PhemexEnvironment)
member.summary: Get the Rest client for a specific user. In case the client does not exist yet it will be created and the should be provided, unless has been called prior for this user.
member.param: The credentials for the user. Required the first time a client is requested for this user unless has been called prior for this user.

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPhemexUserClientProvider.GetSocketClient(System.String,Phemex.Net.PhemexCredentials,Phemex.Net.PhemexEnvironment)
member.summary: Get the Socket client for a specific user. In case the client does not exist yet it will be created and the should be provided, unless has been called prior for this user.
member.param: The credentials for the user. Required the first time a client is requested for this user unless has been called prior for this user.

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexRestClientSpotApi.ExchangeData
member.summary: Endpoints related to retrieving market and system data

member.name: T:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData
member.summary: Phemex Spot exchange data endpoints. Exchange data includes market data and system status.

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetProductsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get product and currency information
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /public/products

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetProductsPlusAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get extended product and currency information
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /public/products-plus

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetServerTimeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get server time
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /public/time

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetTickersAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get 24-hour spot ticker statistics for all symbols
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /md/spot/ticker/24hr/all

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetTickerAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get 24-hour spot ticker statistics for a symbol
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /md/spot/ticker/24hr

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetOrderBookAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get order book snapshot
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /md/orderbook

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetFullOrderBookAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get full order book snapshot
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /md/fullbook

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetRecentTradesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get recent trades
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /md/trade

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexSocketClientSpotApi.SubscribeToTradeUpdatesAsync(System.String,System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexTradeUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Subscribe to trade updates
Docs:
Endpoint:
wss://ws.phemex.com (method: trade.subscribe)
member.param: ["symbol"] The symbol to subscribe, for example sBTCUSDT
The event handler for the received data
Cancellation token for closing this subscription
member.returns: A stream subscription. This stream subscription can be used to be notified when the socket is disconnected/reconnected

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPhemexSocketClientSpotApi.SubscribeToTickerUpdatesAsync(System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexSpotTickerUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Subscribe to all-symbol spot ticker updates
Docs:
Endpoint:
wss://ws.phemex.com (method: spot_market24h.subscribe)
member.param: The event handler for the received data
Cancellation token for closing this subscription
member.returns: A stream subscription. This stream subscription can be used to be notified when the socket is disconnected/reconnected

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexOrderBookEntry.QuantityEv
member.summary: ["1"] Quantity, scaled by base currency valueScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexProduct.BaseTickSizeEv
member.summary: ["baseTickSizeEv"] Base tick size scaled by base currency valueScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexProduct.QuoteTickSizeEv
member.summary: ["quoteTickSizeEv"] Quote tick size scaled by quote currency valueScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexProduct.MinOrderValueEv
member.summary: ["minOrderValueEv"] Minimum order value scaled by quote currency valueScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexProduct.MaxBaseOrderSize
member.summary: ["maxBaseOrderSize"] Maximum base order size display value

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexProduct.MaxBaseOrderSizeEv
member.summary: ["maxBaseOrderSizeEv"] Maximum base order size scaled by base currency valueScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexProduct.MaxOrderValueEv
member.summary: ["maxOrderValueEv"] Maximum order value scaled by quote currency valueScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexTicker.BidPriceEp
member.summary: ["bidEp"] Best bid price, scaled by priceScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexTicker.AskPriceEp
member.summary: ["askEp"] Best ask price, scaled by priceScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexTicker.TurnoverEv
member.summary: ["turnoverEv"] Turnover, scaled by quote currency valueScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexTicker.VolumeEv
member.summary: ["volumeEv"] Volume, scaled by base currency valueScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.Models.PhemexTrade.QuantityEv
member.summary: ["3"] Quantity, scaled by base currency valueScale

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.PhemexApiAddresses.RestClientSpotAddress
member.summary: The address used by the PhemexRestClient for the Spot API

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.PhemexApiAddresses.SocketClientSpotAddress
member.summary: The address used by the PhemexSocketClient for the websocket Spot API

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.PhemexApiAddresses.Default
member.summary: The default addresses to connect to the Phemex API

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.Objects.PhemexApiAddresses.TestNet
member.summary: The testnet addresses to connect to the Phemex API

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.PhemexCredentials.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create new credentials providing credentials in HMAC format

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.PhemexCredentials.#ctor(CryptoExchange.Net.Authentication.HMACCredential)
member.summary: Create new credentials providing HMAC credentials

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.PhemexEnvironment.#ctor
member.summary: ctor for DI, use for creating a custom environment

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.PhemexEnvironment.GetEnvironmentByName(System.String)
member.summary: Get the Phemex environment by name

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.PhemexExchange.FormatSymbol(System.String,System.String,CryptoExchange.Net.SharedApis.TradingMode,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Format a base and quote asset to a Phemex recognized spot symbol

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.PhemexExchange.ScaleValue(System.Decimal,System.Int32)
member.summary: Scale a Phemex Ep/Ev/Er integer field to decimal using the exchange scale

member.name: M:Phemex.Net.PhemexExchange.ConvertNanosecondsToDateTime(System.Int64)
member.summary: Convert a Phemex nanosecond timestamp to UTC DateTime

member.name: P:Phemex.Net.PhemexExchange.RateLimiter
member.summary: Rate limiter configuration for the Phemex API

member.name: T:Phemex.Net.PhemexRateLimiters
member.summary: Rate limiter configuration for the Phemex API

member.name: E:Phemex.Net.PhemexRateLimiters.RateLimitTriggered
member.summary: Event for when a rate limit is triggered

member.name: E:Phemex.Net.PhemexRateLimiters.RateLimitUpdated
member.summary: Event when the rate limit is updated. Note that it's only updated when a request is send, so there are no specific updates when the current usage is decaying.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPhemex(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Add services such as the IPhemexRestClient and IPhemexSocketClient. Configures the services based on the provided configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPhemex(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Phemex.Net.Objects.Options.PhemexOptions})
member.summary: Add services such as the IPhemexRestClient and IPhemexSocketClient. Services will be configured based on the provided options.
member.param: Set options for the Phemex services

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind_PhemexOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to bind the given object instance to configuration values by matching property names against configuration keys recursively.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.TryGetConfigurationValue(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the configuration value for the specified key.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.ValidateConfigurationKeys(System.Type,System.Lazy{System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions)
member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.
